item.title: Allergens (full list)
item.description: Allergens: 1. Gluten 2. Eggs 3. Fish 4. Peanuts 5. Crustaceans 6. Milk 7. Soy 8. Sesame 9. Nuts 10. Celery 11. Mustard 12. Lupine 13. Sulphur dioxide 14. Molluscs 15. Garlic

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Sprout Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Sprout Lunch Menu: A selection of fresh seasonal vegetables that you can combine with a protein of your choice and create your own meal salad.

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Homebound Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Homebound Lunch Menu: Creamy mushrooms on crispy homemade sourdough bread with slow-roasted tomatoes and gremolata. White bean salad and ricotta (1+6+15)

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Globetrotter Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Globetrotter Lunch Menu: Open wrap with creamy refried beans, mushrooms, white quinoa, coleslaw, lime dressing, coriander, jalapeños and tomato salsa (1+2+11+15)

item.title: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu: Crunchy vegetable patty of courgettes and chickpeas, packed with spices and served with tomato, cucumber, cabbage and creamy aioli (1+2+8+15)

item.title: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu: Creamy risotto inspired by the season's finest greens, with fresh ricotta cream and aromatic herb oil (1+6+13+15)

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu: Matar paneer – rich green pea curry with soft Indian cheese, served with fluffy jeera rice and topped with crispy namkeen. With achar (lime pickle), creamy raita, Indian salad and fresh coriander (1+6+13+15)
